title: Ekstra Bladet Comparison Website
description: Designed the comparison website and campaign material for Ekstra Bladet at Adservice.
problem: Ekstra Bladet, a publisher partner of the affiliate company Adservice, wanted to turn its large audience into revenue. The opening: a comparison solution that helped readers compare popular services and earned affiliate income from their choices.
challenge: Adservice is an affiliate company that connects advertisers and publishers. Ekstra Bladet was one of our publishers which wanted to generate revenue with their large traffic, through a comparison solution.
solution: A comparison website and campaign material were designed resulting in several subpages of different popular services such as internet, eletricity, telephone subscriptions and streaming services.

process.body: Identified the popular services worth comparing for Ekstra Bladet's audience — internet, electricity, telephone subscriptions, and streaming.
Designed the website and a set of subpages, one per service category, using a shared design system for consistency.
Produced supporting marketing design and implemented the site in frontend code.
